title:
Discover
Villa Los Reyes
description: Welcome to Villa Los Reyes in Viñales. With more than 20 years of experience, we offer hotel and extra-hotel services adapted to your needs. We are dedicated to guaranteeing your maximum comfort, ensuring that you enjoy an ecological resort with 24-hour electricity availability. Come and enjoy a unique experience in an incomparable environment.

images.alt: Interior garden with reddish paths and elevated terrace surrounded by tropical vegetation.
Cozy bedroom with queen bed and red walls
Rustic bar counter at Villa Los Reyes bar with hanging crystal glasses and wine bottles on light stone walls
Solar panels installed on the terrace of Villa Los Reyes with view of the Viñales mogotes.

title: Privileged location
description: Located in a privileged environment, Villa Los Reyes is situated in the picturesque town of Viñales, offering easy and fast access to all local attractions while enjoying the tranquility and natural beauty of the region.

title: Natural beauty
description: At Villa Los Reyes, in addition to finding a place of rest, you can access a variety of experiences and adventures. We offer guided eco-activities by local experts that will allow you to explore the natural and cultural beauty of Viñales, from hiking excursions, horseback, car, and bicycle rides to visits to tobacco plantations and caves.

images.alt: Panoramic view of the Viñales valley and its mogotes under a clear sky.

title: Comfort
description: Villa Los Reyes is a private ecological resort of modern construction, equipped with solar panels to guarantee 24-hour electricity. It offers five comfortable rooms, a restaurant with local and international dishes and a bar with exquisite Cuban cocktails. It also has a pool perfect for hot days and wheelchair accessibility. From its terraces, you enjoy a majestic view of the mogotes, completing a unique experience of comfort and nature.

images.alt: Detailed view of vibrant red flowers and lush vegetation next to the pool area

title: Sustainability
description: We are proud to say that our villa is sustainable, as the electrical energy we use is managed through solar panels, thus contributing to the care of the environment. In addition, we have implemented recycling practices and efficient water use, ensuring that every aspect of our operation minimizes ecological impact and promotes a greener and healthier future.

images.alt: Solar panels installed on the terrace of Villa Los Reyes with view of the Viñales mogotes.
